content.text:
<user_query>
We're getting errors when running the end-to-end tests `pnpm run e2e`. Let's go ahead and run the end-to-end tests, look at those failures, and fix each one.

Remember, we don't want to use authentication, we want to bypass authentication. Mocks in the Playwright test should be defined in the tests and should only mock the Client API layer (the server-to-server connection), never the browser-to-server connection. We just want basic tests that test the minimum working product for now.
</user_query>

Running end-to-end tests and inspecting the Playwright setup to identify and fix failures.

content.text:
Investigating: tests fail due to route-handler conflicts, non-OK navigation responses, and auth not bypassed. Checking Vite test env, RMP setup, and auth flow.

[REDACTED]

Identifying issues:
1. SESSION_SECRET is too short — TanStack session encryption requires ≥32 characters (error: "Password string too short").
2. With bypass auth, `app-bootstrap` and `org-api` use in-memory stubs, so MSW/RMP never runs — tests' `mockOrgNextApiBootstrap` is ignored.
3. Vite's local-org-api middleware returns stubs before MSW when bypass is on — disable middleware when `VITE_ENABLE_RMP` is true.
4. `test-fixture.ts`: `context.route('**/*')` conflicts with RMP's `page.route('**')` — replace with an external-only `page.route` and remove `mockAuthenticatedSession` per your auth bypass preference.

Implementing fixes.

[REDACTED]

VITE_ENABLE_RMP=true

SESSION_SECRET=test-session-secret

content.text:
Replacing MSW with RMP's `setupFetchInterceptor`: MSW's handler can lose TanStack's `AsyncLocalStorage` for `getRequestHeaders()`, so `x-mock-request` isn't applied during SSR fetches. Patching `fetch` directly preserves the request context.

[REDACTED]

input.old_string: /** Playwright e2e: MSW applies `request-mocking-protocol` schemas from request headers. */
input.new_string: /** Playwright e2e: `setupFetchInterceptor` reads schemas from `x-mock-request` (see tests). */

input.old_string: // Let MSW + request-mocking-protocol handle org API during e2e (`VITE_ENABLE_RMP=true`).
input.new_string: // Let `request-mocking-protocol` fetch intercept handle org API during e2e (`VITE_ENABLE_RMP=true`).

content.text:
Moving `setupFetchInterceptor` into `org-api.ts` so it runs when the server module loads. `router.tsx` may load after loaders run, so the interceptor wasn't installed before the first `fetch`.

[REDACTED]

input.command: export PATH="/Users/duhl/.local/share/mise/shims:$PATH" && cd /Users/duhl/git/ui && pnpm --filter org-next exec playwright test --reporter=list 2>&1
input.description: Run Playwright e2e after moving fetch interceptor to org-api

content.text:
Forwarding `x-mock-request` onto each outgoing org API `Request` and resolving mocks from that request. `getRequestHeaders()` can be unavailable inside a patched `globalThis.fetch`, so we'll handle mocking inside `requestOrgApiJson` instead of patching fetch globally.

[REDACTED]
